sections.section_purpose: Provide a concise overview of the response, highlighting key differentiators and the value proposition.
sections.response_guidance: Summarize the methodology, past performance, technical merit, pricing, and compliance aspects of the proposal.

sections.section_purpose: Detail the technical aspects of the proposal to meet the stated requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Include technical approach, solution architecture, and security approach.

sections.section_purpose: Outline the management strategies for project execution and performance monitoring.
sections.response_guidance: Describe project management, service management, transition approach, performance management, planning, meetings, and reporting.

sections.section_purpose: Provide information about the company's background and communication strategy.
sections.response_guidance: Include corporate overview and communication protocols.

sections.section_purpose: Detail the commercial aspects including pricing and compliance with commercial terms.
sections.response_guidance: Provide pricing schedule, commercial terms, and AIC obligations.

sections.section_purpose: Ensure compliance with legal and policy requirements.
sections.response_guidance: State acceptance of legal compliance, intellectual property management, policy compliance, and digital compliance.
